body.title: Update context-load to read from palace instead of flat files
body.result: step 2c (ADC palace snapshot, hash-gated) + step 3 (decisions from palace.decisions.*); smoke-tested; fallbacks in place
body.description:
Replace context-load's flat-file reads with palace queries: palace.shared.rules.* (already partially done via psql), palace.shared.akien.*, palace.days.* (last 10 for the lookback layer), palace.projects.agent_datacenter.summary. The 2000-token budget constraint stays. Hash-gating stays for rules (unchanged). Decision hot-window moves from decisions_log.dsb tail to palace.decisions.* query.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md, ADC skills/context-load/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** palace DB always; context-load is HIGH-inertia (every session depends on it)
**Scope boundary:** IN: palace queries replace flat-file reads for rules/akien/days/decisions. OUT: removing the slate read (slate stays flat-file — it's the daily working doc), removing the channel read, removing the approvals check.
**Test plan:** context-load produces a valid briefing from palace queries with no flat-file reads for rules/akien/days; 2000-token budget preserved; graceful fallback when palace is unreachable.
